name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — how did we do?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favourite appointment, so it really does mean a lot that you trusted us with your visit.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd be grateful if you shared a quick review — honest feedback helps other nervous patients find a clinic where they can feel comfortable:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something wasn't quite right, please just hit reply and let us know directly — we'd much rather hear from you first so we can make it right.

Take care,
The Bright Smile team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick follow-up. If you have 30 seconds, a short review would mean a lot to us: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. Thanks!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
